recommendations.title: Bis
recommendations.overview: Éric and Patrice have been friends since high school. Over the years, they have both taken very different paths: Éric has become a hedonist, has a string of girlfriends and is always on the look out for a new one; Patrice has become a monogamous fath

recommendations.title: The Marquis
recommendations.overview: Thomas Gardesse, a traveling alarm systems salesman, is arrested for a minor offense and sentenced to six months imprisonment. To win the respect of his fellow inmates, he claims he is "The Marquis," a brilliant robber whose identity has remained a m

recommendations.title: The Perfect Date
recommendations.overview: Michel dreams of a perfect meeting with the woman of his dreams, entirely due to chance, as his parents and grandparents experienced. Vincent, Michel's contrast, is completely different. He is more the man of the direct approach and he follows his...

recommendations.title: My Cousin the Sexologist
recommendations.overview: Two cousins began to discover their sexuality together in adolescence and they reunite after ten years: he only recently returned to bachelorhood, and she returned from Buenos Aires, where she opted to specialize in Sexology.

recommendations.title: Raising Arizona
recommendations.overview: When a childless couple—an ex-con and an ex-cop—take one of a wealthy family’s quintuplets to raise as their own, their lives grow more complicated than anticipated.

recommendations.title: Extreme Movie
recommendations.overview: A sketch comedy movie about the joys and embarrassments of teen sex. But mostly the embarrassments.

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - L’autre c’est moi
recommendations.overview: L'Autre c'est moi est le troisième spectacle de l'humoriste Gad Elmaleh, en 2005.

recommendations.title: Permis de construire
recommendations.overview: When his father passes away, a dentist in Paris inherits a plot and the will to build a house on it. The situation becomes tricky when he learns the plot is located in Corsica.

recommendations.title: Coming Home
recommendations.overview: Lu and Feng are a devoted couple forced to separate when Lu is arrested and sent to a labor camp as a political prisoner during the Cultural Revolution. He finally returns home only to find that his beloved wife no longer remembers him.

recommendations.title: Battle of the Sexes
recommendations.overview: The true story of the 1973 tennis match between world number one Billie Jean King and ex-champ and serial hustler Bobby Riggs.
